message:
feat(ffs-harness): add ext4 fixtures for group desc, inode, dir block (bd-2zg)

Add 5 new sparse JSON fixtures:
- ext4_group_desc_32byte.json (32-byte group descriptor)
- ext4_group_desc_64byte.json (64-byte group descriptor with high bits)
- ext4_inode_regular_file.json (regular file with extent)
- ext4_inode_directory.json (directory inode)
- ext4_dir_block.json (directory block with 3 entries)

Add validation helpers and tests:
- validate_group_desc_fixture(), validate_inode_fixture(),
  validate_dir_block_fixture()
- 5 new unit tests + 3 new conformance tests

Update ParityReport: ext4 parsing 6→9/19, FUSE surface 1→6/12.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
